title: Add remove items to monday.listen in monday-sdk-js
excerpt:
Could you add remove items to monday.listen call? 
When item is removed on the board, there is no event available in board view to reflect the change. 
There is a note that it is planned, is there an ETA available?

posts.author: Andrzej (Andrzej Bieniek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you add remove items to monday.listen call?
When item is removed on the board, there is no event available in board view to reflect the change.

There is a note that it is planned, is there an ETA available?

Monday.listen("events") missing some updates monday Apps & Developers
Hey @yureckey You are right, not all events which are happening on the board are exposed via “events” api in the SDK. Right now we are supporting “new items” (which includes all types of creating an item, including the duplication), and “change column value”. It is documented in the SDK documentation (not in a very clear way, we will make it more clear) [image] We are going to add support for more events (change name, remove items, etc.) in the near future.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Andrzej

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

This is an option we are planning to implement, but I’m afraid I can’t commit to a specific ETA just yet. That said, please stay tuned for future updates as we continue improving the platform.

-Alex
